scope.focus: Repo-level keeper manifest for the four active post-ingest rbassist workstreams.

shared_foundations.role: Primary operator-facing workflow and command reference.
shared_foundations.why_keep: Future agents need one stable entry point for how rbassist is meant to run.

shared_foundations.role: Backlog and delivery-status map for current rbassist priorities.
shared_foundations.why_keep: This is the quickest way to see what is done versus still risky.

shared_foundations.role: Stable north-star brief for mission, scope, current truth, and working rules.
shared_foundations.why_keep: This is the first continuity file future agents should read.

shared_foundations.role: Rolling session log for what changed, what was learned, and what remains next.
shared_foundations.why_keep: This preserves short-form continuity between work sessions.

shared_foundations.role: Detailed implementation chronology for ingest, hygiene, and Rekordbox work.
shared_foundations.why_keep: This prevents future agents from rediscovering the same local-state history.

shared_foundations.role: Shared path normalization, audio walking, and meta loading helpers.
shared_foundations.why_keep: Most hygiene and rollout work depends on these path semantics staying consistent.

shared_foundations.role: Durable quarantine load/merge/write logic for known-bad assets.
shared_foundations.why_keep: The active root is rollout-ready only because quarantine became durable and reusable.

workstreams.summary: Metadata health, stale-path review, safe bare-path repair, and active-root cleanup.

keeper_files.role: Canonical health audit, pending-gap scan, path normalization, and bare-path repair logic.
CLI entry point for health baselines and before/after hygiene deltas.
Safe path normalization and collision-remediation workflow.
Bare/orphan filename resolver and safe apply wrapper.
Health-audit regression coverage.
Normalization and collision-remediation regression coverage.
Bare-path resolution regression coverage.
Detailed implementation map for health and import UX work.
Baseline summary of health, path normalization, and gap findings.

workstreams.summary: Read-only Rekordbox audit, review queues, and backup-first relink apply readiness.

keeper_files.role: Live Rekordbox audit, relink suggestions, consolidation planning, and duplicate dry-run logic.
Splits large Rekordbox audits into high-confidence, ambiguous, and duplicate review queues.
Existing Rekordbox database access and import helpers.
CLI wrapper for read-only Rekordbox-vs-root auditing.
CLI wrapper for review queue generation from audit outputs.
Rekordbox audit regression coverage.
Review-queue generation regression coverage.

workstreams.summary: Duplicate detection, review queues, and preferred-keeper decisions across root files and Rekordbox references.

keeper_files.role: Meta-based duplicate grouping and staging helpers.
Name-plus-duration duplicate dry-run logic built from the music-root catalog.
Exports same-name different-type duplicate review queues.
Writes the duplicate review queue outputs.
Duplicate staging regression coverage.
Duplicate dry-run regression coverage inside the Rekordbox audit path.

workstreams.summary: End-to-end rollout readiness for the active music root: gaps, quarantine, maintenance, analyze, and indexing.

keeper_files.role: Embedding engine and checkpoint-aware encode path.
Incremental BPM/key/cues analysis pipeline.
Recommendation index creation and chunked index maintenance.
Health baselines, missing-coverage counts, and root-scoped gap logic.
Root-scoped pending-embed discovery.
Chunked subprocess embed supervisor with retry and CPU fallback paths.
Hands-free root maintenance orchestration for audit, embed, analyze, and index phases.
Promotes repeated failed embeds into durable quarantine.
Condenses maintenance outputs into readable summaries.
Chunked embed supervisor regression coverage.
Maintenance supervisor regression coverage.
Quarantine merge/load/write regression coverage.
Chunked index maintenance regression coverage.
High-level system status summary.

local_runtime_keepers.role: Local library metadata store backing health, ingest, and export workflows.
local_runtime_keepers.why_keep: Nearly every active workstream reads from or writes to this local state.

local_runtime_keepers.role: Durable embed quarantine for known-bad assets.
local_runtime_keepers.why_keep: This file keeps repeated bad assets from poisoning unattended runs.

local_runtime_keepers.role: Backup directory for metadata repair operations.
local_runtime_keepers.why_keep: Safe cleanup and relink work should always leave recoverable state behind.

local_runtime_keepers.role: Archive directory for removed or triaged metadata rows.
local_runtime_keepers.why_keep: Future hygiene work needs reversible archival, not silent deletion.

local_runtime_keepers.role: Operational logs, audits, status files, and review queues from live runs.
local_runtime_keepers.why_keep: This is the live evidence trail for rollout QA and Rekordbox review work.
